issues.sample: NEW RAM SHUT DOWN & WONT RUN. DIAGNOSIS DONE BY DEALER TO CONCLUSION OF FUEL SYSTEM FAILURE. DEALER SAID NO PARTS AVAILABLE TO FIX TRUCK. 3RD TRUCK SINCE LATE JUNE.   2019 RAM 2500 WITH DIESEL ENGINE FAIL 30000MI  2020 RAM 3500 WITH SAME ENGINE 9600MI  2020 RAM 3500 4400MI WHICH

narrative.headline: What 2020 Ram 3500 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 112 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
